---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or product improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed feature.

## User Impact

Who benefits and how?

## Scope

What should be included in this request?

## Out of Scope

What should not be included?

## Alternatives Considered

List alternative ideas you considered.

## Additional Context

References, mockups, examples, or related issues.
